resources.string: Freight Launcher
Package name for the main tile app
Activity class for the main tile app
URL for the dispatch webapp
Optional direct login URL for dispatch web app
Open or redirect to dispatch login URL automatically
Allow dispatch tile to expand
Package name for navigation app
Allow navigation tile to expand
Package name for PrePass app
Allow PrePass tile to expand
Package name for ELD app
Main tile size when nothing expanded
Main tile size when tile is expanded
Size of expanded tile
Disable expandable tile taps while vehicle is moving
Enable interaction lock state for demo/testing
Show in-app prompt to set Freight as default Home app
Enable Esper Device SDK-based identity retrieval
Single Esper API token used across SDK activation, direct cloud lookup, and backend auth
Esper tenant console URL, e.g. https://tenant.esper.cloud
Backend endpoint that resolves alias and device name by device identity
Esper enterprise ID used for cloud metadata requests
Emergency kill switch for identity display and Esper identity calls
Optional revision marker to force deterministic config rollouts
Show alias name; when true launcher resolves and displays alias, when false alias is hidden
Device alias value pushed from Esper managed config
Device name value pushed from Esper managed config
Show device name from Esper identity metadata
Show diagnostics panel with config and integration status
Show config warning count in diagnostics panel
